completed_tasks.name: Extract PlaylistGenerator interface, expand PlaylistViewModel, add PlaylistViewModelTest
Create PlaylistScreen composable and wire into MainActivity
Fix auth pipeline bugs (Looper, deletePlaylist, AuthFailureException)
Fix encodeDefaults + scraping client separation + UAT 3-artist run
completed_tasks.progress: 3-artist test passed. Playlist created + 3 tracks added to AliMusings. Root cause of 'No Internet connection': encodeDefaults=true missing from Json config — ResourceId.kind='youtube#video' was silently dropped from request body, causing YouTube API 400 invalidResourceType.

human_actions_pending.action: Run /gsd:verify-work 04 to formally close Phase 4, then /gsd:plan-phase 5
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 4 is functionally complete. All code is clean and committed. Verification is optional but recommended before Phase 5.

decisions.rationale: kotlinx.serialization omits fields at their default value — ResourceId.kind='youtube#video' was never sent in the addPlaylistItem request body, causing YouTube API 400 invalidResourceType masked as 'No Internet connection'.

decisions.decision: Separate scraping OkHttpClient (@Named('scraping')) from YouTube API client
decisions.rationale: AuthInterceptor must not run on unauthenticated EveryNoise scraping requests.
Required by YouTube Data API resource contract for playlistItems.insert.

next_action: Run /gsd:verify-work 04 to close Phase 4 formally, then /gsd:plan-phase 5 for Resilience and Quota Management.
context_notes: Phase 4 is complete. All code committed clean in 9f86bb1. End-to-end pipeline works: scrape EveryNoise -> select 65 artists -> search YouTube -> build AliMusings playlist. Known issue: scraper occasionally returns genre-tag strings as artist names ('new rave', 'experimental indie rock') instead of actual artist names — Phase 2/5 scraping quality issue.
